concerns.detail: Insults document contributors as '生活上的巨婴' (giant babies in life), constituting an unsupported personal character judgment rather than critique of specific advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 学术上的优秀(?)不代表你就能当生活上的巨婴

concerns.detail: Contains detailed descriptors about private individuals (advisor's son and specific female students) that could de-anonymize them within the academic community.
concerns.excerpt: 微信群发系里/外系女生给她硕士老板儿子相亲
